user:
Add everyone and everything in here to my book.

--- MY NOTES ---
Characters:
- Lâm Uyên — a young sect heir, proud, secretly kind.
- Mị Đế — the fallen empress, cold and brilliant, wants the throne back.
- Hạc Thanh — a wandering swordsman who owes Mị Đế a life-debt.
- Bạch Vô Thường — an assassin who serves no one.
- Tô Ngọc — Lâm Uyên's little sister, a healer.
- Diệp Hàn — the old sect master, keeper of a forbidden technique.
Techniques:
- Chân Linh Quyết — a breathing method that refines the core life-essence.
- Vạn Kiếp Đồ — a forbidden sword art that costs the user years of life.
Terms:
- Chân Linh — the core life-essence every cultivator refines.
- Ngũ Hành Tông — the Five-Elements Sect, the dominant power in the region.
- Huyết Nguyệt — the Blood Moon, when spirit beasts go mad.
